title: vepris heterophylla
intro: Vepris heterophylla is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the yellow-leafed Vepris or wild rue. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vepris heterophylla include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Vepris heterophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts for various medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
